zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Poultney I於1360年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓時，他的父親Robert de Poultney43歲，母親Cicely Poutrell of Wysall33歲。他於大約1380年與Joan Wistow在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年4月6日在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Poultney I于1360年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓时，他的父亲Robert de Poultney43岁，母亲Cicely Poutrell of Wysall33岁。他于大约1380年与Joan Wistow在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年4月6日在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Poultney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pountney
meanings: English: locative name from Poultney (Leics), which is recorded as Pontenei in 1086 and Pulteney in 1220. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pulta (genitive * Pultan) + Old English ēg ‘island, piece of dry ground in a fen’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Poultney I was born in 1360, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, his father, Robert de Poultney, was 43 and his mother, Cicely Poutrell of Wysall, was 33. He married Joan Wistow about 1380, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 April 1409, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Poultney I est né en 1360, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Poultney, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Cicely Poutrell of Wysall, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Joan Wistow environ 1380, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1409, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Poultney I 1360 in Misterton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Poultney 43 und seine Mutter Cicely Poutrell of Wysall 33. Er hat um 1380 in Leicestershire, England Joan Wistow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1409 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Poultney I è nato il nel 1360 nel Misterton, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Poultney, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Cicely Poutrell of Wysall, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Joan Wistow circa 1380, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 aprile 1409, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Poultney Iが1360年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Poultneyは43歳，母Cicely Poutrell of Wysallは33歳であった。約1380年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでJoan Wistowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年4月6日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Poultney I(이)가 1360년 영국 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Poultney(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Poutrell of Wysall(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Joan Wistow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 4월 6일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Poultney I nasceu em 1360, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Poultney, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Poutrell of Wysall, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Wistow aproximadamente 1380, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1409, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Poultney I родился в 1360 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Poultney было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Cicely Poutrell of Wysall, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Wistow около 1380 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 апреля 1409 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Poultney I nació en 1360, en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Poultney, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Cicely Poutrell of Wysall, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Joan Wistow aproximadamente 1380, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de abril de 1409, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
